ab: tayhuk kuwing cu mapitu’ pincapngan cu wagi’ i papatiqan cu sawni’.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: papateq la, mawp i papatiqan i papsibaq, kumaal i pancang maha:“ca’rux! tubunani i papsibaq!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: kumaal cami kahabaag maha, “lawkah su’ papsibaq.”
mateq ga, pasibaqan cami ni papsibaq cu lalpu ka kayi’ na Itaal.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Tayal language of numbers.

ab: galgan niyam lumpu i papsibaq, maquwas cami uwi cu quwas na lalpu.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們也唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: payux ku baqun mu ka kayi’ na Itaal.
en: I have learned many Tayal languages.

ab: musa’ kuwing mateq kariariax, makibaq kuwing kariariax cu kayi’ na Itaal, papapung mu i yaya’.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Tayal language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
